title: Data, Database Systems, and the Query Journey
description: A support organization has inconsistent spreadsheets, duplicated customer facts, and no defensible retention process. Learners cumulatively produce a database adoption and data-lifecycle decision record through theory, guided work, debugging, transfer, retrieval, and assessment.
objectives: Trace data through creation, processing, review, retention, retrieval, and defensible destruction.
Compare a DBMS with files and spreadsheets using integrity, concurrency, independence, recovery, and query needs.
Trace a query through parser, planner, executor, storage, buffer, transaction, and recovery responsibilities.
